name: domain-recon
description: Internal must-find fixture for the domain asset. Point target at a domain with a known subdomain set. subfinder + amass + crt.sh enumerate (the union lifts recall); checkdmarc audits DNS hygiene; nuclei takeover templates run over the surface; discovered subdomains become ChildAssets. must_find asserts subdomain discovery; takeover/hygiene recall depends on the chosen target.

competitors.note: No neutral subdomain-enumeration leaderboard. Reference: subfinder vs. amass vs. assetfinder self-published discovery rates. The union-of-sources design targets parity-or-better; the anti-overfit grep keeps scoring source-agnostic.
